response.justification: Sarah Smith has a strong background in software development with expertise in multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java) and systems (distributed systems, micro-services, Kubernetes). However, her experience in C++ (2+ years) falls short of the required 8 years, and she lacks direct experience with cloud architecture, compute technologies, or hardware architecture. While she has leadership experience, it is primarily in development teams rather than technical leadership for large-scale infrastructure.
strengths: Strong background in large-scale distributed systems and micro-services with high throughput (e.g., Dunnhumby media)
Proven track record in open-source project leadership (e.g., GISCollective) and technical mentorship (e.g., workshops, courses)
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud-native technologies
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (2+ years vs. required 8 years)
Lacks direct cloud architecture or compute technologies experience (critical for the role)
No explicit experience in hardware architecture or storage systems (core to the role)
